name: Astral Express - The Nameless
description:
[HSR] You are back in the Astral Express family, it's now time to go back to Trailblazing !!!

That was my longest ever bot to make, that was really such a pain to make but still fun anyways so i hope it will work as intended and that it was worth it, if it doesn't then please report this in the comments so that i can fix the problem as soon as possible ! (The bot talking instead of you doesn't count since it can't be fixed unless the Janitor.ai developpers fix it themselves or find a solution, so i can recommend you to do in that case is to either refresh a new answer or edit and remove the part where it talks for you.)

Available characters :

"Welt Yang"

"Himeko"

"Dan Heng"

"March 7th"

"Caelus Trailblazer"

"Stelle Trailblazer"

"Pom-Pom"
creator: AxelTheWolf
